description_long: This object is a robust vehicle wheel featuring a wide, black rubber tire with a pronounced directional tread pattern. The tread consists of large, chevron-shaped grooves designed for enhanced traction, likely suitable for high-performance or heavy-duty vehicles. The rim is metallic and finished in a glossy black, with a five-spoke design that radiates symmetrically from the central hub. The spokes are thick and slightly angular, contributing to a sturdy and modern appearance. The central hub area is solid, with visible lug nut positions but no decorative hubcap. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, with a sleek, utilitarian aesthetic.
description: A wide, black vehicle wheel with a chevron-patterned tread and a glossy five-spoke metallic rim, designed for strength and traction.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full width of the tire and the prominent chevron tread pattern.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the glossy five-spoke rim and central hub, with lug nut positions visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the wide tire and directional tread pattern.
description_view_3: Rear view of the wheel, showing the inner rim structure and central hub area.
attribute_spoke_pattern: Five evenly spaced, thick spokes arranged radially, each with a slight angular profile and a modern, robust design.
attribute_rim_design: Glossy black metallic rim with a deep lip and a solid, continuous outer edge; the rim is single-piece with no visible beadlock or multi-piece construction.
attribute_lug_nut_configuration: Five lug nut positions arranged in a circular, evenly spaced pattern around the central hub, with no cover.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: Directional chevron tread pattern with large, V-shaped grooves for enhanced traction; no sipes or blocks visible.
